description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of black and reddish-brown exterior walls. The structure is composed of stacked rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic, layered appearance. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, allowing for ample natural light and visual interest. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars and landscaped greenery along the front and side. The main entryway is recessed, providing a sheltered entrance, and the overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior. The house sits on a rectangular lot with a paved area adjacent to the main building.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, black and reddish-brown walls, large asymmetrical windows, and a recessed entryway, set on a landscaped lot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two parked cars, landscaped greenery, and the main entryway with black and reddish-brown walls.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the reddish-brown walls, large windows, and a paved area behind the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the layered, geometric structure, flat roofs, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the black exterior walls, flat rooflines, and a glimpse of the landscaped area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway with a flat overhang, no visible steps, and a minimalist, modern door design.
